source_text: DAAD scholarship for international Data Science master students in Germany. Fully funded. Deadline 2027-08-15. Required documents: CV, Transcript, Statement of purpose.
Global scholarship assistance. Guaranteed scholarship processing. Application fee required before review. Deadline 2027-10-01.
Erasmus Mundus Joint Master in Artificial Intelligence. Scholarship available for partner and programme country students. Deadline 2027-01-12. Countries: Spain, Italy, Netherlands.
Mitacs Globalink Research Internship in Canada for undergraduate students. Funding includes stipend and travel support. Deadline 2027-09-18. Required documents: CV, transcript, reference letter.
Chevening Scholarships enable outstanding emerging leaders to pursue one-year master's degrees in the UK. Fully funded. Applications close 2027-11-04.
Fulbright Foreign Student Program for graduate study in the United States. Funding covers tuition, living stipend, and health insurance. Deadline 2027-05-15.
Commonwealth Master's Scholarships for candidates from eligible low and middle income Commonwealth countries. Fully funded study in the United Kingdom. Deadline 2027-12-10.
ETH Zurich Computer Science Summer Research Fellowship in Switzerland. Stipend provided. Application deadline 2027-02-28. Required: CV, transcript, motivation letter.
Oxford-Weidenfeld and Hoffmann Scholarships and Leadership Programme. Fully funded graduate scholarships at the University of Oxford. Deadline 2027-01-06.
Gates Cambridge Scholarship for postgraduate study at the University of Cambridge. Full-cost scholarship. Application deadline 2027-12-03.
EPFL School of Computer and Communication Sciences Summer Research Program in Switzerland. Monthly living allowance provided. Deadline 2027-01-31.
KAIST International Graduate Admission scholarship in South Korea. Tuition waiver and monthly stipend available. Deadline 2027-03-24.
MEXT Scholarship for research students in Japan. Fully funded by the Government of Japan. Embassy application deadline 2027-05-20.
Australia Awards Scholarships for full-time undergraduate or postgraduate study in Australia. Fully funded. Applications close 2027-04-30.
Vanier Canada Graduate Scholarships for doctoral students at Canadian institutions. Valued at CAD 50,000 per year. Deadline 2027-11-01.
Knight-Hennessy Scholars at Stanford University supports graduate study in the United States. Funding available for up to three years. Deadline 2027-10-09.

RISE Germany offers summer research internships in Germany for undergraduate students in biology, chemistry, physics, earth sciences, engineering, or computer science. Scholarship stipend provided. Deadline 2027-12-15.
Heinrich Boll Foundation scholarships for international students studying in Germany. Funding support available. Application deadline 2027-03-01.
Scholarship guaranteed for Europe. Send documents by WhatsApp only and pay processing fee today. Deadline 2027-07-07.
Professor-funded machine learning research assistant position at a university lab. Interested students should email CV and transcript. Deadline will be announced later.
DSU regional scholarship in Italy for international university students. Benefits may include accommodation, meals, and financial support. Deadline 2027-09-06.
Swedish Institute Scholarships for Global Professionals for master's studies in Sweden. Fully funded. Application portal closes 2027-02-26.
NSERC Undergraduate Student Research Awards in Canada. Paid research experience for eligible undergraduate students. Deadline 2027-02-10.
CERN Summer Student Programme in Switzerland for physics, engineering, computer science, or mathematics students. Allowance provided. Deadline 2027-01-30.
Government of Ireland Postgraduate Scholarship Programme. Provides stipend and fee contribution for master's and doctoral research in Ireland. Deadline 2027-10-12.
